items.title: Converter and provider regression suite
items.precondition: Repository dependencies are installed; Gemini and S3 remain mocked or injected with deterministic fakes.
steps: Run npx vitest run src/__tests__/os-conversion.test.ts src/__tests__/os-foundation.test.ts src/__tests__/os-ingest.test.ts.
Confirm deterministic PDF fallback, GFM reconstruction, image-marker validation, XLSX drawing extraction, config validation, and provider interface tests pass.
items.expected: All targeted unit tests pass without a network call.
items.evidence: 2026-07-10: 3 targeted files, 33 tests passed. 2026-07-14 after fast-forwarding dev/dave: the full backend suite passed 53 files / 403 tests.
items.notes: Synthetic data only; expected error-path logs were emitted by failure tests.

items.title: PDF and XLSX assets persist through conversion
items.precondition: Local disposable Postgres schema os is migrated; S3 and queues are mocked.
steps: Run npm run test:integration:os -- src/integration-tests/os/p6-imports.itest.ts.
Confirm synthetic PDF and XLSX images create os.assets rows and stored Markdown uses /api/admin/os/assets/:id URLs.
items.expected: The P6 integration suite passes and removes all synthetic DB rows afterward.
items.evidence: 2026-07-10: 1 file, 6 integration tests passed with mocked S3.
items.notes: No AWS, Redis, Gemini, dev, or production call was made.

items.title: Wide tables remain semantic and scrollable
steps: Run npm --prefix frontend run test -- OsMarkdownBody.test.tsx osEditorExtensions.test.ts.
Open an OS document containing a table wider than the reading column.
Tab to the table region and scroll horizontally in reader and editor.
items.expected: Native table markup remains present inside a focusable bounded overflow region; TipTap emits and styles tableWrapper.
items.notes: Automated component checks passed in the 2026-07-14 full frontend suite (33 files / 121 tests), and the frontend production build passed; browser keyboard behavior was explicitly waived.
items.waiver: User explicitly waived the signed-in browser keyboard and horizontal-scroll check on 2026-07-14 for finalization. Automated semantic-table and production-build coverage passed; this waiver is not visual evidence.

items.title: Supplied PDFs preserve deterministic source content
items.precondition: Use the two user-supplied PDFs outside Git and inject OsFakeLlmProvider.
steps: Convert both supplied files without live Gemini or S3.
Count extracted assets and GFM table rows without printing document content.
items.expected: Rules remains readable and is flagged for vision; Tech Stack yields one real image and three detected tables before live acceptance.
items.evidence: 2026-07-10: Rules 1757 Markdown chars, 0 images, vision warning; Tech Stack 7299 chars, 1 image, 24 GFM table lines.
items.notes: This proves deterministic extraction only, not the final Rules table reconstruction.

items.title: Rules Repository PDF renders as the source table
items.precondition: Local app at http://localhost:3000/admin; super-admin session; explicit approval to call Gemini and write/clean the configured AWS imports bucket.
steps: Upload Alloro Rules Repository - Alloro Rules Repository.pdf through Admin OS.
Wait for Indexed, open the reader, and inspect the imported table.
Confirm eight columns, five rule rows, multiline descriptions/notes in their cells, and horizontal scrolling.
Record screenshot evidence and delete the imported document and stored objects.
items.expected: One usable eight-column table with five source rules renders without widening the reading card.
items.notes: Blocked on the separate live test/verification gate.
items.waiver: User explicitly waived the live Rules Repository rendering check on 2026-07-14 for finalization. The exact eight-column, five-row browser result remains unverified.

items.title: Tech Stack PDF renders its diagram and three tables
items.precondition: Local app at http://localhost:3000/admin; super-admin session; explicit approval to call Gemini and write/clean the configured AWS imports bucket.
steps: Upload Alloro_Tech_Stack_Reference (1).pdf through Admin OS.
Wait for Indexed and open the reader.
Confirm the real architecture diagram and the owner, monthly-cost, and revision-history tables render in page order.
Record screenshot evidence and delete the imported document and stored objects.
items.expected: The source diagram displays through an authenticated OS asset URL and all three tables remain semantic.
items.evidence: 2026-07-10: the imported Markdown, os.assets row, and 517433-byte PNG object were confirmed; after Rev 5 the authenticated local asset route returned 302 and the target returned a valid PNG.
items.notes: Refresh the signed-in document reader to confirm the formerly broken image now displays in the UI.
items.waiver: User explicitly waived the signed-in Tech Stack reader check on 2026-07-14 for finalization. Asset extraction and authenticated PNG delivery passed, but the final browser presentation remains unverified.

items.title: Vision failure degrades without failing import
items.precondition: Use injected renderer/provider failures and synthetic PDF data.
steps: Run the targeted converter tests.
Verify screenshot failure and invented image markers fall back to deterministic text and real placeholders with page-specific warnings.
items.expected: Import conversion resolves with readable source content and warnings; no invented marker or URL is stored.
items.evidence: 2026-07-10: renderer-failure and invented-marker tests passed in os-conversion.test.ts.

items.title: Live acceptance state is fully cleaned up
steps: Delete both manual acceptance documents.
Confirm associated import, version, asset, activity, and S3 objects are gone.
items.expected: No manual acceptance rows or objects remain after evidence capture.
items.waiver: User explicitly waived cleanup verification on 2026-07-14 for finalization. Existing local manual-test documents, database rows, asset rows, and stored objects were not deleted by this finalization.

items.title: Library accepts a multi-file drop as one import batch
items.precondition: Authenticated super-admin session at http://localhost:3000/admin/os; use two supported test files.
steps: Drag two supported files over the Library card and confirm the drop overlay appears.
Drop both files and confirm the import modal stays closed.
Confirm both processing documents appear in the Library from one batch and no duplicate request is created.
Repeat a non-file document or folder drag and confirm the file overlay and import do not trigger.
items.expected: All dropped files are submitted together exactly once through the existing batch import flow and appear directly in the Library; the modal stays closed and non-file drag and drop is unchanged.
items.evidence: 2026-07-10: automated tests passed for two-file forwarding, overlay cleanup, non-file drag ignore, one direct mutation call, a closed modal, and the unchanged Import-button modal path.
items.notes: Live signed-in browser verification remains pending.
items.waiver: User explicitly waived the signed-in multi-file drag-and-drop browser check on 2026-07-14 for finalization. Automated batch, modal, overlay, and non-file-drag coverage passed.

items.title: The shared Admin OS workspace uses the available desktop width
items.precondition: Authenticated super-admin session at http://localhost:3000/admin on a desktop viewport wider than 1600px.
steps: Open Library and confirm its card uses the wider workspace.
Open a document and confirm the left rail, reading column, and right rail have more space.
Open editor, Chat, and Trash and confirm the same responsive outer gutters remain.
items.expected: All Admin OS routes share a centered workspace capped at 1600px instead of 1200px, without horizontal page overflow.
items.evidence: 2026-07-10: OsShell now owns a single max-w-[1600px] cap for every nested OS route.
items.notes: Live signed-in visual confirmation remains pending.
items.waiver: User explicitly waived the wide-desktop visual check on 2026-07-14 for finalization. The shared 1600px shell cap is code-verified but not browser-verified.

items.title: Extracted OS images pass both auth gates and return valid bytes
items.precondition: Local app server and one converted Tech Stack document with an extracted os.assets row.
steps: Request the stored asset with a short-lived local super-admin query JWT and do not follow redirects automatically.
Confirm the OS route returns 302, then fetch the short-lived target.
Confirm the target is a PNG with the stored byte length and PNG signature.
Request the asset without a token and confirm it remains blocked.
items.expected: The authenticated asset path returns a short-lived redirect to valid image/png bytes; missing and invalid tokens remain rejected and other Admin OS routes still require header auth.
items.evidence: 2026-07-10: middleware tests passed for valid, missing, invalid, and non-asset OS requests. The live local asset route returned 302; its target returned image/png, 517433 bytes, and a valid PNG signature; no-token returned 401.
items.notes: Read-only verification used the existing local DB row and existing stored object; it created no document, asset, or S3 state.

items.title: Editor matches the final Alloro OS table and image interactions
items.precondition: Authenticated super-admin session at http://localhost:3000/admin/os; use an editable document containing an image, a table, a following paragraph, and an empty code block.
steps: Scroll the editor and confirm the formatting toolbar remains below the two sticky Admin Hub headers.
Place the cursor in the table and use its corner gear to add and delete a row and column, then confirm the delete-table action is present.
Select the image and confirm its top-right delete and bottom-right resize controls appear; resize it, save, and reopen the document.
Press Backspace at the start of the block after the image and confirm the image is selected without deleting prior text; press Backspace again and confirm Delete? appears; press Escape to cancel.
Press Backspace at the start of an empty code block and confirm it changes to a paragraph before content above it can be joined or removed.
items.expected: The toolbar, table-corner menu, image edge controls, width persistence, and intentional Backspace behavior match the final Alloro OS source implementation while tables remain semantic and full width.
items.evidence: 2026-07-10: focused editor parity suite passed 6 files / 21 tests. 2026-07-14 after fast-forwarding dev/dave: the full frontend suite passed 33 files / 121 tests; focused ESLint, TypeScript, and the production build passed.
items.notes: Live signed-in browser verification remains pending.
items.waiver: User explicitly waived the signed-in editor interaction check on 2026-07-14 for finalization. Focused and full automated suites passed; toolbar stickiness, resize persistence, table controls, and Backspace behavior remain unverified in a live browser.
